name: uv
description: Python package manager for MCP services and dependency installation.
description_zh: 用于 MCP 服务与依赖安装的 Python 包管理工具。

name: bun
description: JavaScript runtime used by MCP services and related toolchains.
description_zh: MCP 服务及相关工具链使用的 JavaScript 运行时。

name: fd
description: Fast file finder, alternative to find.
description_zh: 快速文件查找工具，find 的替代品。

name: rg
description: Fast text search tool (ripgrep), alternative to grep.
description_zh: 快速文本搜索工具 (ripgrep)，grep 的替代品。

name: rtk
description: CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by compressing terminal output before it reaches the AI context window.
description_zh: CLI 代理工具，通过压缩终端输出来减少 LLM token 消耗。

name: lark-cli
description: Official Lark/Feishu CLI covering Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, and more with 200+ commands and AI Agent skills.
description_zh: 飞书官方 CLI，覆盖消息、文档、多维表格、日历等 200+ 命令及 AI Agent 技能。

name: gh
description: GitHub CLI for repository and workflow management.
description_zh: GitHub CLI，用于仓库和工作流管理。

name: ntn
description: Official Notion CLI for authentication, Workers management, and full Notion API access from the terminal.
description_zh: Notion 官方 CLI，支持身份验证、Workers 管理和完整的 Notion API 终端访问。

name: claude
description: Anthropic's agentic coding tool for the terminal.
description_zh: Anthropic 的终端智能编程工具。

name: codex
description: OpenAI's open-source coding agent that can read, edit, and execute code in your local repository.
description_zh: OpenAI 的开源编程代理，可读取、编辑和执行本地仓库中的代码。

name: pi
description: AI agent toolkit with coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI/web UI, and Slack bot.
description_zh: AI 代理工具包，包含编程代理 CLI、统一 LLM API、TUI/Web UI 和 Slack 机器人。

name: opencode
description: Open-source AI coding agent supporting 75+ models with GitHub Actions integration for automated workflows.
description_zh: 开源 AI 编程代理，支持 75+ 模型并集成 GitHub Actions 自动化工作流。

name: hermes
description: Self-improving AI coding agent by Nous Research that creates skills from experience and persists knowledge across sessions.
description_zh: Nous Research 开发的自我进化 AI 编程代理，能从经验中创建技能并跨会话持久化知识。

name: openclaw
description: Cross-platform personal AI assistant with chat, voice, canvas, camera, and screen capture capabilities.
description_zh: 跨平台个人 AI 助手，提供聊天、语音、画布、摄像头和屏幕捕获等功能。
